_note: Mock current-affairs events for local development. All content is fictional/illustrative. Scores below are model INPUTS (severity/urgency/confidence/relevance); the pipeline computes signal_score, source_quality, FEINTCON impact, penalties and explanations.

events.title: Coordinated cyber intrusion disrupts regional power grid operator
events.summary: A regional grid operator reports a coordinated intrusion affecting control systems; rolling load-shedding underway while engineers isolate affected segments.

events.title: Cross-border strikes reported along contested frontier
events.summary: Multiple cross-border strikes are reported along a contested frontier. Official statements confirm exchanges; casualty figures differ sharply between sources.

events.title: Coalition talks collapse ahead of snap election
events.summary: Governing coalition negotiations collapsed, setting up a snap election. Parties trade blame over the breakdown of budget and migration talks.

political_framing.right_frame: Spending disputes made the coalition untenable.

events.title: Magnitude 7.1 earthquake strikes coastal province
events.summary: A magnitude 7.1 earthquake struck a coastal province. Authorities report structural damage and are assessing casualties; tsunami advisory issued and later downgraded.

events.title: Pipeline outage tightens regional fuel supply
events.summary: An unplanned pipeline outage has tightened regional fuel supply, with operators warning of short-term price pressure while repairs proceed.

events.title: Federal budget standoff risks partial government shutdown
events.summary: A federal budget standoff is raising the risk of a partial government shutdown as negotiators miss a procedural deadline.

events.title: Naval drills increase activity in regional strait
events.summary: Expanded naval drills have increased military activity in a strategically sensitive strait, prompting heightened monitoring of shipping lanes.

events.title: Prison riot escalates amid gang clashes
events.summary: A prison riot has escalated amid clashes between rival groups. Authorities report the facility is being secured; conditions remain volatile.

events.title: Cluster of respiratory illness under investigation
events.summary: Health authorities are investigating a localized cluster of respiratory illness. No pathogen has been confirmed; surveillance has been stepped up.

events.title: Lawmakers advance comprehensive AI oversight bill
events.summary: Lawmakers advanced a comprehensive AI oversight bill out of committee. The proposal sets transparency and risk-tiering requirements; debate continues.

events.title: Unverified posts claim large blasts along contested frontier
events.summary: Unverified social posts claim large blasts along the contested frontier. Imagery is unconfirmed and partly recycled from older incidents; treat with caution.
